[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Amount of rewards dropped in Bounty & Missions will be doubled.

🗓️Bounty*2: 12/26(Mon) 19:00 – 1/2(Fri) 18:59(UTC)
🗓️Mission Normal*2: 12/26(Mon) 19:00 – 12/30(Fri) 18:59(UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard*2: 12/30(Fri) 18:59 – 1/2(Mon) 18:59(UTC)
